# Violetta Beauty

> A private nail studio in Borisov — one chair, one hour, one quiet ritual at a time.

Violetta is a solo nail studio offering manicure, gel nails, nail design, and beauty services in Borisov, Belarus. Booking is available online through the website.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://violetta.beauty/en/welcome
- Services (menu): https://violetta.beauty/en/services
- Gallery (portfolio): https://violetta.beauty/en/gallery
- About the master: https://violetta.beauty/en/master
- VIP membership: https://violetta.beauty/en/membership

## Services

Manicure, gel nails, nail design, chrome, bridal nails, lace design, and aftercare. Prices include consultation, refreshment, and aftercare.

## Location

Borisov, Belarus

## Contact

Booking via website. Telegram: @violetta
